transcription.text: poor Cinderella she couldn't go to the ball until she cleaned the sink now Cinderella had it tough to have no babble made it rough she worked harder than a dog but she couldn't get rid of old sink smog so sad she didn't have babble so sad she didn't have babble too bad she could only wish she had brighter whiter babble and then appeared a fairy queen who said here's how to get things clean babble and power pack thoughts my dear we'll make that sink smog disappear yes babble's power packed suds sweeps away sink smog in seconds no more drudgery it's babble for me that's why so many many many my brighter wider no sink smog with babble
